# Specific AI Crawlers, prevent from using brand identity, see recreate.ai terms and conditions.

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
User-agent: Google-Extended
User-agent: CCBot
User-agent: Omgilibot
User-agent: Omgili
User-agent: FacebookBot
User-agent: Diffbot

User-agent: Claude-Web
